current_task: Optimized Game Over screen with Stage Replay and Restart stage options
next_actions: Verify Game Over stage retry actions work seamlessly without full page reloading.
notes: Added a '🔄 重玩本关' (Replay Current Stage) button on the Game Over screen that resets the gameOver flag and specific accumulative radiation/suspicion metrics without reloading the page, seamlessly jumping back to the phase start. The full restart option is renamed to '⚡ 重开整场游戏 (清空存档)' which clears localStorage and reloads the page. This prevents accidental loss of progress due to ambiguous wording.
